_comment: Ontologies SMA-1 auto-registers on startup (set SMA_MANIFEST to this file's path). Ontologies mount lazily on first use, so listing ~100 here is cheap. 'cases' is optional eager indexing; usually you index incrementally via the index_cases tool. ground_threshold=null => no cite-or-abstain gate until calibrated.

go.text: DNA damage response coordinating repair and checkpoint arrest
